title: Hide the automations panel for undesired viewers (members / guests / viewers)

posts.author: ilariatottolo2 (ilaria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

It has been requested multiple times from clients to get to hide the automation panel for people (they could be user members or guests), who should not see it for any reason.

This could possibly be inserted as an account permission to establish and select from the Admin section.

This feature is getting more & more requested and hopefully you can implement it soon!

Thank you!
